title: What to know about tendinitis before using medicinal herbs
intro: Herbal teas, such as ginger and turmeric blends, offer natural anti-inflammatory properties, making them an excellent choice to support tendinitis recovery. The antioxidant-rich green tea helps reduce inflammation, while chamomile tea promotes relaxation and better sleep, aiding in the healing process. Lavender tea, with its soothing qualities, can help alleviate pain and soreness, making it another ideal option for individuals seeking herbal relief for tendinitis.
definition: Tendinitis is the inflammation or irritation of a tendon, a thick band of tissue that connects muscles to bones. This condition results from repetitive stress, overuse, or sudden injuries, causing pain, swelling, and limited mobility. If left untreated, tendinitis can worsen, leading to chronic pain, tendon rupture, and decreased quality of life. Therefore, addressing tendinitis promptly and adopting proper ergonomics, stretching, and strengthening exercises is crucial to maintaining an active, productive, and fulfilling lifestyle.
